{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 6, the 'Middle Class Housing Act of 2022', aims to streamline the approval process for housing developments in mixed-use areas.",
    "Assembly Bill 2011, the 'Affordable Housing and High Road Jobs Act of 2022', also seeks to streamline housing development approvals in mixed-use areas.",
    "The bipartisan support for Senate Bill 6 and Assembly Bill 2011 was secured among legislators in both the Senate and Assembly.",
    "Senate Bill 1421 will add a person with a developmental disability who has experienced homelessness to the California Interagency Council on Homelessness advisory committee.",
    "The California Interagency Council on Homelessness aims to develop policies and identify resources to prevent and end homelessness in California.",
    "The appointment under Senate Bill 1421 is expected to bring an added perspective to the advisory committee focused on homelessness."

}
